posts.author: BruceGabin (Bruce Gabin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just when I thought I was getting to understand automations.

So I managed to successfully create an automation:
When Create Contact Clicked
And
Person Name is ABC
Move to Contacts group named ABC

What I also wanted was the status in the Contact Group for person ABC that the status of Sale is also displayed.
Unfortunately the Status in the Contacts board is shown as blank.

I have attached the automation I tried.

My other thought was do I try setting an automation within the Contacts board that when a Lead is brought across with the status of Sale then update status to Sale?

My aim is when Leads are brought across to Contacts that there is a Status attached showing why the Lead was brought across.

Monday-Contact-board951×600 33.2 KB
